chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6179 of 2023 C.P.No.D-5301 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No. 635/2024 3. For hearing of CMA No. 28884/2023 4. For hearing of main case 14.10.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo advocate for the petitioners Ms. Wajiha Mehdi Asstt. Attorney General for Pakistan Mr. Abdul Samad advocate for respondent No.3 -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The petitioners have challenged the fact-finding inquiry dated 18.10.2023 in both these petitions. The said challenge is presently pending before the Syndicate of the Federal Urdu University of Arts, Science & Technology. Accordingly, the Syndicate is directed to decide the petitioners’ complaint against the fact-finding inquiry expeditiously Copy of this order shall be sent to Vice Chancellor, Federal Urdu University of Arts, Science & Technology, Karachi, for compliance. The instant petitions are disposed of in the above terms along with listed/pending applications. Office is directed to place copy of this order in the captioned connected petition. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
